ddls:
CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game in which the event occurred */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time in the game when the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter in which the event occurred */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score at the time of the event */,
  "shot_type" TEXT /* Type of shot (e.g., 2-point, 3-point, free throw) */,
  "shot_distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the shot */,
  "shot_result" TEXT /* Result of the shot (e.g., made, missed) */,
  "reb_type" TEXT /* Type of rebound (e.g., offensive, defensive) */,
  "foul_type" TEXT /* Type of foul (e.g., personal, technical) */,
  "substitution_type" TEXT /* Type of substitution (e.g., in, out) */,
  "player_1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first player involved */,
  "player_2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second player involved */,
  "player_3_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third player involved */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_player_2_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_2_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_player_1_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_1_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_player_3_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_3_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game took place */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., in progress, final, postponed) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary referee */,
  "assistant_referee_1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first assistant referee */,
  "assistant_referee_2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second assistant referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_assistant_referee_2_id FOREIGN KEY ("assistant_referee_2_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_assistant_referee_1_id FOREIGN KEY ("assistant_referee_1_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team plays */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's coach */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's captain */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team's colors */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* Player's college (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., Shot, Rebound, Turnover) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the event type (e.g., offensive, defensive, administrative) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon representing the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user has */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
